center.name: 拉賈安帕特群島
center.summary: 拉賈安帕特群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Dwarf fruit dove、Spice imperial pigeon、長尾鵟等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in lowland and foothill forest in New Guinea and the Raja Ampat Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The great-billed parrot is found in forest, woodland and mangrove in the south-east Asian islands of Maluku, Raja Ampat, Talaud, Sangir, Sarangani, the Lesser Sundas, and nearby small islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia, where it occurs in the eastern Moluccas and the Raja Ampat Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and some neighboring island groups.Raja Ampat, Aru, Biak, and Yapen groups
